moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 is underway at Silverstone Circuit from July 3rd to 5th, with practice and sprint qualifying today, leading to the main race on Sunday.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: Silverstone is buzzing! The British Grand Prix is officially GO this weekend. Who are you backing for pole position and the win?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Rev your engines! The British Grand Prix is happening right now at Silverstone. Catch all the action live, or are you heading to the circuit?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are well underway at the All England Club, running from June 29th to July 12th, with third-round matches taking place today and tomorrow.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: It's Week 1 of Wimbledon and the tension is building on the grass courts! Who are your picks to make it to the finals?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Anyone else got Wimbledon fever? Matches are heating up at the All England Club – time for some strawberries and cream!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Elle King
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Elle King, known for hits like 'Ex's & Oh's', turns 37 today.

angles.name: Elle King's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 37th Birthday to the incredible Elle King! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Celebrating Elle
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Elle King, celebrating her 37th birthday today! From rock to country, she does it all.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vince Clarke
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Erasure, Depeche Mode, and Yazoo, celebrates his 66th birthday today.

angles.name: Synth Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 66th Birthday to synth-pop icon Vince Clarke! Erasure, Depeche Mode, Yazoo – what's your favourite project?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the man behind so many 80s and 90s classics, Vince Clarke, turning 66 today!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Shane Lynch
moments.blurb: Boyzone member Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday today.

angles.name: Boyzone's Shane at 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Boyzone's very own Shane Lynch! Still got your Boyzone posters up?

angles.name: Celebrating Shane
angles.copy: Fifty and fabulous! Wishing a huge Happy Birthday to Shane Lynch of Boyzone fame.

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is out now, revealing the nation's biggest hits and new entries.

angles.name: New Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The Official UK Singles Chart is IN! Any surprises at the top spot this week? Who's your new favourite?

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: Another Friday, another chart battle! What's your prediction for this week's UK Number 1 single?

moments.title: Legally Blonde Prequel 'Elle' Streaming
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', began streaming on Prime Video on July 1st.

angles.name: Bend and Snap!
angles.copy: It's here! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' is now streaming on Prime Video. Are you ready for more fashion and legal fun?

angles.name: New Series Alert
angles.copy: Need something new to binge? 'Elle', the 'Legally Blonde' prequel, dropped on Prime Video this week!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for hits like 'The Power of Love', turns 76 on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love for Huey
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Huey Lewis's 76th birthday on Sunday! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: On Sunday, we're wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to the one and only Huey Lewis!

moments.title: Happy Birthday John Keeble
moments.blurb: John Keeble, drummer for the iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, turns 67 on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: Spandau Ballet Beat
angles.copy: On Monday, we're celebrating Spandau Ballet's John Keeble turning 67! What's your go-to Spandau hit?

angles.name: True Gold
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday loading for Spandau Ballet drummer John Keeble this Monday! Feeling the 80s vibes.

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: It's Your Birthday!
angles.copy: Get ready to wish 50 Cent a Happy 51st Birthday on Monday! What's your favourite track from the hip-hop legend?

angles.name: G-Unit to Birthday Unit
angles.copy: Monday is 50 Cent's 51st birthday! Spin some of his classics to celebrate.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, turns 86 on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr this Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles drum moment?

angles.name: Beatles Drummer
angles.copy: Tuesday marks the 86th birthday of rock legend Ringo Starr! Give some Beatles a spin to celebrate.

moments.title: 'Little House on the Prairie' on Netflix
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the beloved classic 'Little House on the Prairie' is set to premiere on Netflix on July 9th.

angles.name: Prairie Memories
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip down memory lane! A new 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation lands on Netflix this Thursday.

angles.name: Family Drama
angles.copy: New on Netflix this Thursday: a fresh take on 'Little House on the Prairie'! Perfect for a cosy night in.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, one half of the iconic Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on Thursday, July 10th.

angles.name: West End Star
angles.copy: It's a big one for Neil Tennant of the Pet Shop Boys, turning 72 this Thursday! What's your favourite PSB hit?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the legendary Neil Tennant this Thursday! Always been 'West End Girls' for us.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Perrie Edwards
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, July 10th.

angles.name: Little Mix Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 33rd Birthday to Little Mix's Perrie Edwards this Thursday! What's your favourite Little Mix anthem?

angles.name: Pop Star Celebrations
angles.copy: Thursday is Perrie Edwards' 33rd birthday! Time to blast some Little Mix and celebrate.

moments.title: New Thriller 'The Dark' on ITVX
moments.blurb: A new Scottish wilderness thriller, 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres on ITVX on July 12th.

angles.name: Scottish Thriller
angles.copy: Get ready for a chilling new thriller! 'The Dark', set in the Scottish wilderness, drops on ITVX this Sunday. Who's watching?

angles.name: New ITVX Drama
angles.copy: Sunday brings new drama to ITVX with 'The Dark'. Prepare for suspense and stunning Scottish scenery.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Christine McVie
moments.blurb: The beloved Fleetwood Mac singer and keyboardist Christine McVie would have been 83 on Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Remembering a Legend
angles.copy: On Sunday, we remember the incredible Christine McVie of Fleetwood Mac, who would have been 83. Her music lives on!

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring legacy of Christine McVie, who would have turned 83 this Sunday. What's your favourite Fleetwood Mac song she sang?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for Some
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays have officially begun in Scotland (July 2nd) and Northern Ireland (July 1st).

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for schools in Scotland and Northern Ireland! What are your big plans?

angles.name: Holiday Mode On
angles.copy: Parents in Scotland and Northern Ireland, you've made it! Summer holidays have begun. Enjoy the break!
